hero.title: Step into stories that answer back.
hero.subtitle: Talk to characters, inspect scenes, uncover evidence and build your own conclusion in AI-powered narrative investigations.
hero.caseTitle: The final toast at Hotel Aurora
hero.caseQuestion: Ask the pianist what she saw after midnight...

how.title: One story. Many clues. Your conclusion.
how.subtitle: Every investigation starts with a briefing, but the path to the truth depends on the questions you ask.

enter.title: Enter the case
enter.description: Read the briefing, understand the objective and choose where to begin.

investigate.title: Investigate freely
investigate.description: Talk to characters, inspect objects and explore locations for hidden details.

solve.title: Find the truth
solve.description: Collect enough evidence, connect the facts and submit your conclusion.

experience.title: This is not just choosing options. It is investigating.
experience.subtitle: Tellery turns every story into a living board: suspects, places, objects, required clues and endings that depend on what you uncovered.

characters.title: Characters that answer
characters.description: Ask natural questions and follow contradictions, memories and clues.

scenes.title: Explorable scenes
scenes.description: Observe environments, inspect objects and unlock hidden evidence.

endings.title: Consequential conclusions
endings.description: The story closes with a summary, epilogue and score based on your investigation.

premium.title: New mysteries to keep investigating.
premium.subtitle: Use credits to start stories and unlock premium experiences with a subscription.

finalCta.title: Stories where you do not watch from outside. You take part.
finalCta.subtitle: Enter Tellery, open a case and discover how far your questions can take the story.

metadata.title: Tellery
metadata.description: Interactive stories where you talk, investigate and uncover the truth.
